template_data.headline_html:
IT'S NOT THE
RATE. IT'S
THE PROOF.
template_data.sub: The GSA negotiation is won or lost on documentation — not on the number you quote.

image_headline: IT'S NOT THE RATE. IT'S THE PROOF.
image_prompt: Infographic alert layout. Dark navy background. Bold headline top: 'IT'S NOT THE RATE. IT'S THE PROOF.' Left side: illustrated professional man in blazer holding document labeled 'BASIS OF AWARD', confident stance. Right side: two stacked comparison rows — red X with short label 'NO TRAIL', green checkmark with label 'DOCUMENTED'. Bold accent divider between rows. Bottom dark navy banner with white bold text: 'PROVE IT'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
